app.name: EasyClip
errors.disk.full: There isn't enough free space to save here. Free up space or pick another folder.
errors.input.invalid_path: We couldn't read that file. Try a different one.
errors.media.unsupported: We don't recognise that file format.
errors.output.invalid_path: We can't save to that location. Pick a folder you have write access to.
errors.output.same_as_input: This would overwrite your original file. Choose a different name or folder.
errors.processing.failed: Something went wrong while saving. Try again.
errors.selection.too_narrow: Part of your selection is too short to cut losslessly in this video. Adjust the nearest cut and try again.
errors.sidecar.unusable: EasyClip's media engine couldn't start. Reinstalling usually fixes this.
edit.hintBase: Drag the side anchors to set the head and tail. Drag across the band to mark a section to cut.
edit.hintKeyframes: All cuts snap to the nearest keyframe so the export is lossless.
edit.cutsSummary.empty: No cuts yet — drag across the band to mark a section to remove.
edit.merge.title: Merge into one cut?
edit.merge.body: These two cut regions overlap. Merge them into a single cut?
save.hint: We'll save the trimmed copy here. Your original file is never modified.
save.error.empty: Filename and location can't be empty.
save.error.invalid_chars: That filename has characters we can't use. Try letters, numbers, dashes, and dots.
save.error.same_as_input: This would overwrite your original file. Choose a different name or folder.
proc.hint: Stream-copying selected ranges. No re-encode — this is fast.
pick.hint: Choose a video or audio file to trim.
pick.dropCue: or drag and drop one here (coming in v2)
pick.info.heading: File details
pick.error.heading: We couldn't open that file
wizard.steps.file-pick.title: Pick a file
wizard.steps.save.title: Where should we save?
wizard.confirm.startOver.title: Start over?
wizard.confirm.startOver.body: Your trim and cut selections will be lost.
